economic_notes: Government business enterprises include Kyah Development Limited Partnership, Kyah Development Corporation, and Kyah Food and Fuel Inc. A $5,000,000 distribution was received from a Nation enterprise during the year.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified for three reasons: (1) no budget was prepared for year ended March 31, 2022 as required by PSAB standards; (2) financial statements for Nation business enterprises (not dependent on First Nation) were unavailable so adjustments to investment and earnings could not be determined; (3) financial statements for consolidated business enterprises (dependent on First Nation) were unavailable so consolidation adjustments could not be determined. Prior year 2021 restated figures reflect error corrections of $2,819,559. Witset Social Housing is the only fully consolidated subsidiary. GBEs include Kyah Development LP, Kyah Development Corporation, and Kyah Food and Fuel Inc. accounted for under modified equity method.
